name: Sanity Check

# This tells GitHub to run the script every time you push code
on: [push]

jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install HTML Linter
        run: npm install -g htmlhint

      - name: Run HTML Validation
        run: htmlhint "**/*.html"
